findings.summary: PR readiness is durably initiated and confirmed before the merge-capable deployment-verifier role.
findings.evidence: The coordinator derives a deterministic operation ID from runId and exact HEAD, binds the existing PR number, validates open/non-draft/exact-HEAD confirmation, and stops before merge on stale HEAD, closed PR, or provider failure.

findings.summary: Required validation evidence passed on the reviewed commit.
findings.evidence: Evidence evidence_symphony_10_pr_readiness_1908764 reports 277 tests passed with 2 skipped and make all passing formatting, specs, Credo, 100% coverage, and Dialyzer for commit 1908764463438ee5658223e8be87e5c1237cfa7d.

summary: Passed: the exact-HEAD change promotes the existing verified draft PR through bos-mcp before merge, recovers idempotently after response loss, and bounds stale-HEAD, closed-PR, and provider failures; current full-suite evidence is affirmative.
